title: Vijay Sales International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vijay Sales International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vijay Sales International Enterprises! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vijay Sales International Enterprises:
Vijay Sales International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales International Enterprises!
